steps.description: Click the "Azure OpenAI" option in the "Select a service to access LLMs" dropdown within the "Service for Large Language Model (LLM)" dialog in Visual Studio Code.
Type ${{secret:AZURE_OPENAI_API_KEY}} into the "Input Azure OpenAI service key now or set it later in the project" input box in the VS Code command palette.
Press Enter to confirm the Azure OpenAI service key input in the VS Code command palette.
Type ${{env:AZURE_OPENAI_ENDPOINT}} into the "Input Azure OpenAI service endpoint now or set it later in the project" prompt at the top of the VS Code window.
Press the Enter key to confirm the Azure OpenAI Endpoint URL input in the pop-up text field within Visual Studio Code.
Type ${{env:AZURE_OPENAI_MODEL}} into the "Input Azure OpenAI deployment name" prompt at the top of the Visual Studio Code interface.
Press 'Enter' to confirm the Azure OpenAI deployment name  in the input command bar at the top of the Visual Studio Code interface.
